articles.description: Key takeaways:Ether has rebounded from key parabolic and triangle support levels, reviving the case for a $10,000 breakout. articles.description: Ethereum’s latest network upgrade, Pectra, introduced powerful new features aimed at improving scalability and smart account functionality — but it also opened a dangerous new attack vector that could allow hackers to drain funds from user wallets using only an offchain signature.
